query:
-- Pre-register agent accounts so they get linked on first OAuth login
-- These rows will be matched by email when the agent first signs in
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, role, agentName, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('pending_gracel', 'Gracel', 'gracel@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Gracel', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('pending_queenie', 'Queenie', 'queenie@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Queenie', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('pending_ally', 'Ally', 'ally@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Ally', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('pending_miguel', 'Miguel', 'miguelf@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Miguel', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  agentName = VALUES(agentName),
  role = VALUES(role),
  updatedAt = NOW();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NLuybDd1Z2YoG9.root --database mD5oQ9mnwHpgnRSzNG9WvW --execute 
-- Pre-register agent accounts so they get linked on first OAuth login
-- These rows will be matched by email when the agent first signs in
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, role, agentName, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('pending_gracel', 'Gracel', 'gracel@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Gracel', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('pending_queenie', 'Queenie', 'queenie@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Queenie', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('pending_ally', 'Ally', 'ally@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Ally', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('pending_miguel', 'Miguel', 'miguelf@farahilaw.com', 'user', 'Miguel', 'oauth', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  agentName = VALUES(agentName),
  role = VALUES(role),
  updatedAt = NOW();
